name: tdd-workflow
description: Evaluations for tdd-workflow skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when writing tests, new features, or following TDD

prompts.input: Help me write unit tests for this new feature using TDD
prompts.reason: Explicit TDD request for new feature — primary use case

prompts.input: I need to add integration tests for my API endpoint
prompts.reason: Integration test creation is a listed activation scenario

prompts.input: Write tests first before implementing this user authentication feature
prompts.reason: Tests-before-code is the core TDD workflow this skill enforces

prompts.input: How do I refactor this function while keeping existing tests green?
prompts.reason: Refactoring with test coverage is a listed activation scenario

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for questions unrelated to test writing or TDD

prompts.input: What does this test failure message mean?
prompts.reason: Debugging a test failure, not writing tests or following TDD workflow

prompts.input: How do I set up Jest in a Next.js project?
prompts.reason: Test framework setup/configuration, not a TDD development workflow

prompts.input: Explain how mocking works in unit testing
prompts.reason: Conceptual explanation of mocking, not a request to write tests or apply TDD
